allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const pkg = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('node_modules/next/package.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\(pkg.version\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const d = fs.readdirSync\('node_modules/next/dist/server'\); console.log\(d.filter\(f => f.includes\('proxy'\) || f.includes\('middleware'\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
